summary.intent: Create a new quay-3.16 branch in ocp-build-data repository as part of Phase 2 of onboarding Quay 3.16 to the ART pipeline, following the layered product pattern used by MTA and logging.
summary.outcome: Successfully created and pushed the quay-3.16 orphan branch directly to prod with group.yml, streams.yml, releases.yml, OWNERS, and 10 image YAMLs for all Quay components. Started Phase 2.5 work to add quay mappings to art-tools constants.py but transcript ends before completion.

repo: Layered products use orphan branches named like prod/mta-8.1, prod/logging-6.6, or quay-3.16
New products require Phase 2.5 pipeline wiring: entries in PRODUCT_NAMESPACE_MAP and PRODUCT_KUBECONFIG_MAP in art-tools/artcommon/artcommonlib/constants.py
Quay's ART tenant is art-quay-tenant on kflux-ocp-p01, while quay-eng-tenant on stone-prd-rh01 is for Quay team's own Konflux builds
RPAs in konflux-release-data reveal delivery repo names (quay/quay-rhel9, quay/clair-rhel9, etc.) and component metadata
Git remote convention: origin = dev fork (ashwindasr/*), prod = upstream (openshift-eng/*)

Quay 3.16 has 10 components: quay-quay, clair, operator, operator-bundle, bridge-operator, bridge-operator-bundle, container-security-operator, container-security-operator-bundle, builder, builder-qemu
Quay 3.16 uses RHEL 9 (el9) for most images except quay-builder-qemu which uses rhel8
Upstream branches: most use redhat-3.16, clair uses release-4.x series (assumed release-4.7 for 3.16)
workflow: For new branches in upstream repos, can push directly to prod remote without PR (user explicitly authorized)
Use existing RPAs as reference to extract delivery repo names, product IDs, and component lists
Model new product branches after similar layered products like mta-8.1 for group.yml structure
Create orphan branches with git checkout --orphan for clean history unrelated to OCP branches
Onboarding phases: Parse → Tenant → ocp-build-data → Pipeline Wiring → openshift/release → Release Config → Summary

friction: Information gaps required assumptions: Clair branch name, openshift-priv repo existence/naming, exact Dockerfile paths, Go version
Constants.py edit failed initially because file changed after branch switch (stale read)
No dev remote configured in art-tools despite CLAUDE.md mentioning it
open_items: Phase 2.5 constants.py changes in art-tools not yet committed/pushed (in progress when transcript ends)
Verify openshift-priv mirror repos exist for all 10 Quay components
Confirm exact Dockerfile paths within each upstream repo
Verify Clair upstream branch is release-4.7 for version 3.16
Verify OWNERS file has correct Quay team maintainers
May need to switch from open to hermetic network mode in group.yml after initial builds
Verify Go 1.22 is correct version for Quay 3.16 components
